pattern: I think (that) + 句子
slots: you are right he is nice it's a good idea
example: I think (that) you are right.

pattern: I don't think (that) + 句子
slots: it's a good idea he will come it's true
example: I don't think (that) it's a good idea.

pattern: I believe (that) + 句子
slots: he is telling the truth you can do it she is honest
example: I believe (that) you can do it.

pattern: I know (that) + 句子
slots: you are busy he is a good person she works hard
example: I know (that) you are busy.

pattern: I'm sure (that) + 句子
slots: everything will be fine he will come we can finish
example: I'm sure (that) everything will be fine.

pattern: I'm sorry (that) + 句子
slots: I'm late I forgot I missed the call
example: I'm sorry (that) I'm late.

pattern: He said (that) + 句子
slots: he would come he was busy she was happy
example: He said (that) he would come.

pattern: She told me (that) + 句子
slots: she liked it she needed help he was sick
example: She told me (that) she liked it.

pattern: I heard (that) + 句子
slots: the store is closing he got married she moved
example: I heard (that) the store is closing.

pattern: I'm not sure (that/whether) + 句子
slots: I can go it will work I understood
example: I'm not sure (that) I can go.

pattern: I don't know + wh-词 + 句子
slots: what he wants where he is why she left
example: I don't know what he wants.

pattern: The + 名词 + that + 句子 + be...
slots: book I read is interesting movie I watched is good
example: The book that I read is interesting.

pattern: The + 人 + who + 句子 + be...
slots: person who called is my boss friend who helped me is kind
example: The person who called is my boss.

pattern: Do you know the + 人 + who + 句子?
slots: girl who is talking to Tom man who is standing there
example: Do you know the girl who is talking to Tom?

pattern: The + 地点 + where + 句子 + be...
slots: restaurant where we met is still there school where we studied is far
example: The restaurant where we met is still there.

pattern: This is the reason why + 句子
slots: I came I called I left I chose this
example: This is the reason why I came.

pattern: There are many + 名词 + that + 句子
slots: things that I want to learn books that I want to read
example: There are many things that I want to learn.

pattern: 主语 + want to + 动词原形
slots: learn Spanish travel abroad buy a car
example: I want to learn Spanish.

pattern: 主语 + hope to + 动词原形
slots: see you again finish on time hear from you
example: I hope to see you again.

pattern: 主语 + would like to + 动词原形
slots: apply for this job book a table speak to the manager
example: I would like to apply for this job.

pattern: 主语 + decided to + 动词原形
slots: study abroad change my job move to a new city
example: I decided to study abroad.

pattern: 主语 + promised to + 动词原形
slots: help him be on time finish it
example: I promised to help him.

pattern: Don't forget to + 动词原形
slots: call me bring your passport lock the door
example: Don't forget to call me.

pattern: 主语 + 动词 + 目的: to + 动词原形
slots: came here to study English went to store to buy food saved money to buy a car
example: I came here to study English.

pattern: It's + 形容词 + to + 动词原形
slots: important to practice every day fun to travel with friends hard to say goodbye
example: It's important to practice every day.

pattern: 主语 + have + 名词 + to + 动词原形
slots: something to tell you a lot to learn nothing to say
example: I have something to tell you.

pattern: 主语 + enjoy + 动名词
slots: reading books listening to music cooking
example: I enjoy reading books.

pattern: 主语 + like/love + 动名词
slots: swimming watching movies traveling
example: I like swimming.

pattern: 主语 + hate + 动名词
slots: waiting in long lines being late losing
example: I hate waiting in long lines.

pattern: 主语 + started/finished + 动名词
slots: learning English writing the report reading the book
example: I started learning English.

pattern: 主语 + keep + 动名词
slots: trying practicing learning moving forward
example: I keep trying.

pattern: 主语 + be good at + 动名词
slots: remembering names solving problems learning languages
example: I'm good at remembering names.

pattern: 主语 + be interested in + 动名词
slots: learning new things art music photography
example: She is interested in learning new things.

pattern: 主语 + be tired of + 动名词
slots: waiting working too much the same routine
example: He is tired of waiting.

pattern: 动名词 + be + 形容词
slots: Swimming is a lot of fun Traveling is educational Reading is relaxing
example: Swimming is a lot of fun.

pattern: Thank you for + 动名词
slots: helping coming calling waiting
example: Thank you for helping me.

pattern: I'm sorry for + 动名词
slots: being late not calling disturbing you forgetting
example: I'm sorry for being late.

pattern: I think it's + 形容词 + to + 动词原形
slots: important to practice every day necessary to save money fun to try new things
example: I think it's important to practice every day.

pattern: I know that + 主语 + wants to + 动词原形
slots: he wants to be a doctor she wants to be a teacher they want to start a company
example: I know that he wants to be a doctor.

pattern: I believe that + 动名词 + be + 形容词
slots: learning English is fun cooking is an art traveling is educational
example: I believe that learning English is fun.

pattern: The + 名词 + that + 句子 + is to + 动词原形
slots: thing you can do is to keep trying way to learn is to practice
example: The best thing that you can do is to keep trying.

pattern: I think the + 名词 + that + 句子 + is worth + 动名词
slots: movie that we watched is worth seeing book that we read is worth reading
example: I think the movie that we watched is worth seeing.

pattern: I decided to + 动词原形 + because I think + 句子
slots: learn English it's important for my future start running it's healthy
example: I decided to learn English because I think it's important.

pattern: 主语 + enjoy + 动名词 + because + 句子
slots: traveling I think it's the best way to learn reading I think it's relaxing
example: I enjoy traveling because I think it's the best way to learn.
